title: Garden Mile Carbon Steel Dutch Hoe Garden Tool for Garden and Lawn Versatile and Lightweight Gardener Hand Tools (91cm) made from Heat treated and oil cooled Carbon Steel Strong Tough and Durable
features: Durable Construction: With a sturdy build and a size of 91cm, this tool is a reliable companion for your gardening endeavours, whether you're a home improvement enthusiast or a professional gardener.
Precision Blade: The precision-designed blade ensures efficient soil penetration and cutting, making it an essential gardening accessory for both novice gardeners and seasoned enthusiasts alike.
Made from high quality and very durable carbon steel means this garden tool is strong, lightweight and will withstand the test of time, making your time in the garden easy and enjoyable for years.
Used to shape soil, remove weeds, clear soil, and harvest root crops. Shaping the soil includes piling soil around the base of plants (hilling), digging narrow furrows (drills) and shallow trenches.
Gardening Tool: Perfect for various outdoor tasks, including digging, edging, and border work. This garden spade is a versatile addition to your gardening tools, enhancing your gardening experience.
